market_pulse: Strong EDC Week momentum across Strip venues with coordinated pool party lineups; LIV and Tao Beach positioning heavily for May 14-17 festival week.

weekend_readiness.label: HIGH
factors: EDC Week pool parties confirmed (Above & Beyond, Porter Robinson, DJ Snake, Steve Aoki)
Sommer Ray performing LIV Beach Friday (May 8)
David Guetta headlining LIV Beach Saturday (May 9)
Major DJ debuts this weekend (Westend, RL Grime, Lil Wayne at Zouk)
Cinco de Mayo weekend energy carrying into week
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Capitalize on EDC Week momentum with exclusive LIV Beach/Nightclub EDC pre-parties; coordinate with talent influencers like @globeth0tter for live reaction posts.

content_gaps.description: Competitors (Tao Beach, Palm Tree, Encore) aggressively teasing EDC Week pool party lineups with TikTok countdowns and behind-the-scenes. LIV underrepresenting festival week connection.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch TikTok series: 'EDC Week Countdown' with live DJ prep footage, guest list insider tips, day-of content plan from LIV Beach.

content_gaps.description: Omnia, Zouk posting influencer takeovers and creator features. LIV posts primarily carousel/static. No creator spotlight series detected.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Feature emerging Vegas creators (e.g., @globeth0tter style reviews) in 15-30 sec TikTok/Reel series: 'LIV Approved' guest reviews.

content_gaps.description: Tao Beach, Encore Beach using trending summer audio (lo-fi hip-hop, tropical house remixes). LIV using generic club beats.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Test trending audio on LIV Beach posts: lofi hip-hop, island vibes, festival energy tracks for shorts.

influencer_activity.mention: Posted honest review of LIV Nightclub as guest list attendee; 591 likes, 61 comments. High engagement on club experience feedback.

Headlining LIV Beach Saturday May 9, 2026. Major EDM draw; anticipated significant social mentions from attendees and fan accounts.

liv_outreach_targets.context: Already posted LIV review; highly engaged Vegas nightlife creator. Good candidate for EDC Week takeover or LIV Beach appearance.
